items.title: Google Research launches Groundsource, a geo-tagged time series dataset created by using Gemini to extract 2.6M flood events from 5M historical news articles (Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch)
items.title_en: Google Research launches Groundsource, a geo-tagged time series dataset created by using Gemini to extract 2.6M flood events from 5M historical news articles (Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch)
items.title_zh: Google Research 推出了 Groundsource，这是一个地理标记的时间序列数据集，通过使用 Gemini 从 500 万篇历史新闻文章中提取 260 万个洪水事件而创建（Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch）
